# Foxit

> Foxit provides PDF software, AI-powered document intelligence tools, OCR solutions, eSignature workflows, and developer SDKs for creating, editing, securing, signing, and automating document workflows.

Use product pages for feature overviews and commercial details. Use blog, tutorials, knowledge base, and developer documentation for implementation guidance.

---

## Primary (High Priority)

- [Foxit PDF Editor](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-editor/): Edit, organize, and manage PDF documents.
- [Foxit eSign](https://www.foxit.com/esign-pdf/): Send, sign, track, and manage electronic signatures.
- [Foxit PDF Reader](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-reader/): View, annotate, and interact with PDF files.
- [Foxit AI](https://www.foxit.com/ai/): AI-powered tools for summarizing, analyzing, extracting, and transforming documents.
- [Foxit API](https://www.foxit.com/api/): API platform overview for PDF processing, eSignature, and document automation.
- [All Foxit Products](https://www.foxit.com/products/catalog/): Central hub for all Foxit products.

---

## Commercial & Conversion Pages

- [PDF Editor Compare](https://www.foxit.com/compare/): Compare Foxit PDF Editor with alternatives.
- [eSign Compare](https://www.foxit.com/esign-pdf/compare/): Compare Foxit eSign solutions.
- [Adobe Acrobat Alternative](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-editor/adobe-acrobat-alternative/): Compare Foxit vs Adobe Acrobat.
- [Volume Licensing](https://www.foxit.com/products/volume/): Licensing for teams and enterprises.
- [Admin Console](https://www.foxit.com/admin-console/): Enterprise portal for managing users, licenses, and deployments.
- [Online Store](https://www.foxit.com/shopping/): Purchase and subscription options.
- [Contact](https://www.foxit.com/company/contact/): Contact sales and support.

---

## Solutions and industries

- [Paperless Office](https://www.foxit.com/solution/paperless-office/): Digitize document processes.
- [Accessibility](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-editor/accessibility/): Create and remediate accessible PDFs.
- [Education](https://www.foxit.com/edu/): Solutions for education.
- [Government](https://www.foxit.com/solution/government/): Public sector workflows.
- [Banking](https://www.foxit.com/solution/banking/): Financial document workflows.
- [Insurance](https://www.foxit.com/solution/insurance/): Insurance document processing.
- [Legal](https://www.foxit.com/solution/legal/): Legal document workflows.
- [Healthcare](https://www.foxit.com/solution/healthcare/): Healthcare document management.
- [Manufacturing](https://www.foxit.com/solution/manufacturing/): Manufacturing workflows.
- [IT Services](https://www.foxit.com/solution/it-services/): IT and automation solutions.

---

## Online tools

### Conversion tools

- [PDF to Word](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-word/): Convert PDF to Word.
- [Word to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/word-to-pdf/): Convert Word to PDF.
- [PDF to JPG](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-jpg/): Convert PDF to JPG.
- [JPG to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/jpg-to-pdf/): Convert JPG to PDF.
- [PDF to PNG](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-png/): Convert PDF to PNG.
- [PNG to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/png-to-pdf/): Convert PNG to PDF.
- [PDF to Excel](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-excel/): Convert PDF to Excel.
- [Excel to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/excel-to-pdf/): Convert Excel to PDF.
- [PDF to PPT](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-ppt/): Convert PDF to PowerPoint.
- [PPT to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/ppt-to-pdf/): Convert PowerPoint to PDF.
- [PDF to HTML](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-html/): Convert PDF to HTML.
- [HTML to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/html-to-pdf/): Convert HTML to PDF.
- [PDF to Text](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-text/): Extract text from PDF.
- [Text to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/text-to-pdf/): Convert text to PDF.
- [PDF to TIFF](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-tiff/): Convert PDF to TIFF.
- [TIFF to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/tiff-to-pdf/): Convert TIFF to PDF.
- [PDF to BMP](https://www.foxit.com/pdf-to-bmp/): Convert PDF to BMP.
- [BMP to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/bmp-to-pdf/): Convert BMP to PDF.
- [RTF to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/rtf-to-pdf/): Convert RTF to PDF.
- [GIF to PDF](https://www.foxit.com/gif-to-pdf/): Convert GIF to PDF.

### Organize and edit tools

- [Merge PDF](https://www.foxit.com/merge-pdf/): Combine PDFs.
- [Split PDF](https://www.foxit.com/split-pdf/): Split PDF files.
- [Compress PDF](https://www.foxit.com/compress-pdf/): Reduce PDF file size.
- [Delete PDF Pages](https://www.foxit.com/delete-pages-from-pdf/): Remove PDF pages.
- [Rotate PDF](https://www.foxit.com/rotate-pdf/): Rotate PDF pages.
- [Extract PDF Pages](https://www.foxit.com/extract-pdf-pages/): Extract PDF pages.

### Security and signing tools

- [OCR PDF](https://www.foxit.com/ocr-pdf/): Make scanned PDFs searchable.
- [Unlock PDF](https://www.foxit.com/unlock-pdf/): Remove passwords from PDFs.
- [Protect PDF](https://www.foxit.com/password-protect-pdf/): Add password protection.

---

## AI tools

### Document understanding
- [Analyze Documents](https://www.foxit.com/ai/analyze-documents/): Analyze and extract insights.
- [Research Assistant](https://www.foxit.com/ai/research-assistant/): Research across documents.
- [Risk Analysis](https://www.foxit.com/ai/risk-analysis/): Detect risks and inconsistencies.

### Chat and interaction
- [Chat with PDF](https://www.foxit.com/ai/chat-pdf/): Ask questions about PDFs.
- [Chat with Image](https://www.foxit.com/ai/chat-image/): Extract information from images.

### Content processing
- [Extract Text](https://www.foxit.com/ai/extract-text-from-pdf/): Extract structured text.
- [PDF Summarizer](https://www.foxit.com/ai/pdf-summarizer/): Summarize documents.
- [PDF Translator](https://www.foxit.com/ai/pdf-translator/): Translate documents.

### Automation and compliance
- [Contract Review](https://www.foxit.com/ai/contract-review/): Analyze contracts.
- [Fraud Detection](https://www.foxit.com/ai/fraud-detection/): Detect fraud patterns.

---

## Learning and support

- [Blog](https://www.foxit.com/blog/): Tech articles.
- [Resource Hub](https://www.foxit.com/resource-hub/): Tutorials, white papers, case studies, and webinars.
- [Knowledge Base](https://kb.foxit.com/s/): Help and troubleshooting.
